user_story.i want to: keep the legacy database ID links active

acceptance_criteria: Let's just point everything back to the DB ID URL as the master version.
technical_notes: URLs are changing. We’re doing the project-based IDs—finally—but we have to keep the legacy database ID links active.
the team already ruled out redirects because of the overhead.
I'm thinking we just bake the rel="canonical" right into the header for all work package routes.
Even if the user is already on the DB ID URL, it doesn't hurt to have the tag there anyway. It keeps the logic simple.
translation: no weird translation issues since it’s just a meta tag in the HTML
out_of_scope: This is strictly a work package thing—don't touch other page types.
